name: Peach Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peaches in a lightly-greased 8-inch square baking dish; set aside.
2. Combine flour, sugar, cinnamon, and salt in a medium mixing bowl; cut in butter with a pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Sprinkle mixture evenly over peaches in prepared dish.
4. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Spoon into individual serving bowls; serve warm with whipped cream.
